title: oxalis lomana var. lomana
intro: Oxalis lomana var. lomana, also known as the 'Wood Sorrel', is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting antioxidant activity. Oxalis lomana var. lomana is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
